content: Safetensors is a safe (non-pickle), zero-copy tensor serialization format, NOT a compression format. Header is 8-byte length + JSON metadata (dtype, shape, data_offsets per tensor), followed by raw tensor bytes. It enables safe loading and partial mmapped loading but stores full-precision or already-quantized weights verbatim. It is the standard HF interchange format; EXL2 models are stored AS safetensors with quantized weight tensors replacing .weight keys.
